nav.announcement: ✦ Premium Handcrafted Alfajores — Made with Love ✦

hero.title: Entremares
hero.subtitle: Premium Handcrafted Alfajores
hero.description: Discover the rich heritage of craftsmanship in every bite. Our handcrafted alfajores are made with passion, using traditional methods and premium ingredients.

brand.story: At Entremares, we believe in the power of tradition and the joy of giving. Each alfajor is a testament to generations of craftsmanship, made with love and the finest ingredients.
brand.craftsmanship: Discover the rich heritage of craftsmanship and authentic flavor in every alfajor.

pages.contactDescription: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the pack you're looking for doesn't exist.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Entremares, we believe that every alfajor tells a story. We are committed to preserving traditional Argentine recipes while bringing them to the world with pride. Each piece is handcrafted with the finest ingredients and unwavering attention to detail.

excellence.title: Handcrafted Excellence
excellence.description: Our makers use time-honored techniques passed down through generations. We refuse to compromise on quality, which is why we use only the finest butter, pure dulce de leche, and premium chocolate in every alfajor we create.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Using only the finest, most premium ingredients

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Handcrafted with care and attention to detail

classic-6.name: Classic Pack
classic-6.description: The perfect introduction to our classics.
classic-6.longDescription: The Classic Pack is a perfect introduction to Entremares alfajores. Each piece is handmade with premium ingredients and traditional techniques, reflecting centuries of handcrafted heritage. This curated selection offers a complete experience of our most loved flavors.

premium-12.name: Entremares Premium Pack
premium-12.description: Our most complete selection. A handcrafted experience of excellence.
premium-12.longDescription: For the true connoisseur, the Premium Pack delivers our finest selection. Perfect for special occasions or as a distinguished corporate gift. With 12 carefully selected pieces, it's the perfect gift for those who appreciate quality and diversity. Ideal for sharing or for a very special gift.

special-edition.name: Special Edition
special-edition.description: Limited edition flavors in premium packaging for special occasions.
special-edition.longDescription: The Special Edition is the pinnacle of the art of making alfajores. With rare ingredients and innovative flavors, each piece is a masterpiece. Premium packaging with a presentation that reflects the exceptional quality of the product. Available in limited quantities.
